content: Now add the footer injection to `custom.js`. It'll fetch `version.json` once and replace the Chainlit disclaimer node:

args.Description:
"Added custom footer injection that replaces Chainlit's 'LLMs can make mistakes' disclaimer with a branded footer matching the original Gradio design: GitHub | Privacy | version-SHA links. Fetches live build data from /public/version.json (written at start
<truncated 37 bytes>
args.Instruction: "Add footer injection function that fetches /public/version.json and replaces Chainlit's disclaimer footer text. Wire it into the observer and polling interval."
